statements.__comment: Cleanup: remove stale RESOLVED_IMAGE edges on :Container from previous runs.
statements.query: MATCH (:Container)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(:Image) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for containers by treating HAS_IMAGE targets as published image artifacts, or by following one IMAGE hop when the target is an ImageTag. Direct Image artifacts resolve immediately. ImageManifestList artifacts resolve through a single architecture-matched CONTAINS_IMAGE child. Only creates the edge when exactly one distinct concrete image candidate exists.
statements.query: MATCH (c:Container)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->()-[:IMAGE*0..1]->(published) WHERE published:Image OR published:ImageManifestList OPTIONAL MATCH (published)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(child:Image) WHERE published:ImageManifestList AND c.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND child._ont_architecture = c.architecture_normalized WITH c, collect(DISTINCT CASE WHEN published:Image AND NOT published:ImageManifestList THEN published WHEN child IS NOT NULL THEN child END) AS candidates WHERE size(candidates) = 1 WITH c, candidates[0] AS img MERGE (c)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(img) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Cleanup: remove stale RESOLVED_IMAGE edges on :Function from previous runs.
statements.query: MATCH (:Function)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(:Image) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for functions by treating HAS_IMAGE targets as published image artifacts, or by following one IMAGE hop when the target is an ImageTag. Direct Image artifacts resolve immediately. ImageManifestList artifacts resolve through a single architecture-matched CONTAINS_IMAGE child. Only creates the edge when exactly one distinct concrete image candidate exists.
statements.query: MATCH (f:Function)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->()-[:IMAGE*0..1]->(published) WHERE published:Image OR published:ImageManifestList OPTIONAL MATCH (published)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(child:Image) WHERE published:ImageManifestList AND f.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND child._ont_architecture = f.architecture_normalized WITH f, collect(DISTINCT CASE WHEN published:Image AND NOT published:ImageManifestList THEN published WHEN child IS NOT NULL THEN child END) AS candidates WHERE size(candidates) = 1 WITH f, candidates[0] AS img MERGE (f)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(img) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
